title: askellia minuta
intro: Askellia minuta, also known as the minute askellia or minute helichrysum, is a small shrub native to Australia that belongs to the daisy family, Asteraceae. The medicinal properties of Askellia minuta are attributed to its essential oil, which contains compounds such as borneol, camphor, and bornyl acetate, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Askellia minuta include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it useful for topical applications. Askellia minuta can be prepared as an essential oil, used in traditional herbal medicine, or as a dried herb for various health remedies.
